name: Fruit Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the smallest size muffin pans with a releasing agent (such as PAM).
2. Heat the oven to 325°F.
3. Mix all ingredients together and spoon a small amount into each muffin hole.
4. Bake for 15-20 minutes at 325°F.
5. Remove immediately from the pans to cool.
These freeze and defrost very nicely, and I have found that I have to make at least four dozen at a time since my husband thinks they are better than candy! (The raisins and dates are great for anti-matzo block!)
